nasb.text: So they roasted the Passover animals on the fire according to the ordinance, and they boiled the holy things in pots, in kettles, in pans, and carried them speedily to all the lay people.

esv.text: And they roasted the Passover lamb with fire according to the rule; and they boiled the holy offerings in pots, in cauldrons, and in pans, and carried them quickly to all the lay people.

cnv.text: 他們按照規矩用火烤逾越節的羊羔，其他的聖物用鍋、用釜，或用煎盤煮熟，迅速地送給眾民；

ccb.text: 他们按规定用火烤逾越节的羊羔，在锅里、罐里和盆里煮圣物，然后迅速分给民众。
